title: GREEN POINT ZELENA TOČKA / SLOVENIA
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A roadmap detailing the development and replication of Green Point, a cooperative-based short food supply chain in Prekmurje, Slovenia. It presents strategies for organizing local producers, using blockchain for traceability, and establishing sustainable retail and wholesale channels to empower farmers and offer affordable local food to consumers.
